topic: Some, any, much, many, few y little
title: Few and little
objective: Expresar cantidades pequeñas y distinguir few, a few, little y a little.

activities.prompt: I have ___ friends in this city, but I am happy.
activities.feedback_correct: A few se usa con amigos contables y significa algunos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Friends es contable plural; usa a few.

activities.prompt: There is ___ water in the bottle, so we need more.
activities.feedback_correct: A little se usa con water y expresa una pequeña cantidad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Water es no contable; usa a little.

activities.prompt: Few students arrived early; the room is almost empty.
activities.feedback_correct: Few con sustantivo contable indica muy pocos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Students es contable plural y la idea es una cantidad insuficiente.

activities.prompt: I have a little time. I can help you.
activities.feedback_correct: A little expresa una cantidad pequeña pero suficiente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La frase dice que sí puede ayudar.

activities.feedback_correct: Books es contable plural, por eso usamos a few.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cambia little por few cuando el sustantivo es contable plural.

activities.prompt: We have a few chairs, but few people are here. There is a little coffee, but little sugar.
activities.question: What is almost finished?
activities.feedback_correct: Little sugar indica una cantidad muy pequeña.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la última parte del mensaje.

activities.prompt: A few books. A little time. Few people. Little money.
activities.feedback_correct: Distingues cantidades pequeñas contables y no contables.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Few va con plurales contables; little va con sustantivos no contables.

activities.prompt: Only a few tickets are left, but there is still a little time to buy them. Few seats are near the stage, and little information is available online.
activities.question: What is available to buy?
activities.feedback_correct: A few tickets significa que quedan algunos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la primera información sobre lo que queda.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about a busy day. Use few, a few, little, and a little at least twice each.
evaluation_criteria: a few with a positive or sufficient meaning
a little with a small but useful amount
activities.feedback_correct: Expresas cantidades pequeñas y sus matices correctamente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Comprueba si la cantidad es suficiente (a few/a little) o insuficiente (few/little).

activities.prompt: Plan an event with limited supplies. Tell the AI what you have few, a few, little, or a little of, and decide what to buy.
activities.feedback_correct: Comunicas cantidades pequeñas y tomas decisiones prácticas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra si la cantidad es suficiente o insuficiente y te ayuda a reformular.
